activity_cards.title: Sanitary Pads Distribution
activity_cards.description: Distributing sanitary pads to girls under 18 across all sub-counties in Kisumu County — so no girl ever misses school because of her period.

activity_cards.title: Relief Food Distribution
activity_cards.description: Providing nutritional support to malnourished children aged 5 and below, identified through clinical assessment at our Community Clinic.

activity_cards.title: Senior School Sponsorship
activity_cards.description: Sponsoring school fees for needy students across Kisumu County throughout their full 4 years of senior school education.

activity_cards.title: Street Work & Reintegration
activity_cards.description: Trained social workers and volunteers reach out to street children — building trust and guiding them towards safe, stable lives.

activity_cards.title: Safe House for Street Girls
activity_cards.description: A secure, nurturing refuge for girls from the streets — including mothers with their children, some of them second-generation street children.

activity_cards.title: Lobby & Advocacy
activity_cards.description: Championing the rights of children and vulnerable communities through policy engagement, awareness campaigns, and coalition building.

activity_cards.title: Research & Publication
activity_cards.description: Generating evidence, documenting impact, and publishing findings to drive informed, effective, and lasting community change.
